title: DEEPSLATE
description: Changes all Block Breaking Sounds to more satisfying ones. Perfect for when you have to excavate an entire chunk of deepslate!
body:
**Block breaking sounds are no longer stale and boring! With DEEPSLATE all block breaking sounds will be audibly pleasing to maximise your block breaking satisfaction!**

---
Useful for when you want to have fun when:
- Excavating an entire chunk of blocks
- Farming a ton of crops
- Taking all the sculk XP in the Deep Dark biome
- Netherite mining
- Just playing on your favourite Prisons server!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/nzP2o8Sgo5M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Enjoy!
